# BuiltWell

> BuiltWell is a licensed home remodeling contractor serving Fairfield and New Haven Counties in Connecticut. We specialize in kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, basement finishing, and flooring installation. CT License #0668405.

## Company Information

- **License:** CT HIC #0668405
- **Office:** 206A Boston Post Road, Orange, CT 06477
- **Phone:** (203) 466-9148 (New Haven County) | (203) 919-9616 (Fairfield County)
- **Hours:** Mon-Fri 8am-5pm, Sat 8am-3pm

## Service Areas

- **Fairfield County (27 towns):** Greenwich, Westport, Darien, New Canaan, Stamford, Norwalk, Fairfield, Ridgefield, Old Greenwich, Cos Cob, Riverside, Rowayton, Bethel, Bridgeport, Brookfield, Danbury, Easton, Monroe, New Fairfield, Newtown, Redding, Shelton, Sherman, Stratford, Trumbull, Weston, Wilton
- **New Haven County (27 towns):** Orange, New Haven, Hamden, Branford, Guilford, Madison, Woodbridge, Milford, West Haven, East Haven, North Haven, Cheshire, Ansonia, Beacon Falls, Bethany, Derby, Meriden, Middlebury, Naugatuck, North Branford, Oxford, Prospect, Seymour, Southbury, Wallingford, Waterbury, Wolcott

## Services

### Primary Services (with town-specific pages)
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://buildwellct.com/kitchen-remodeling/): Full kitchen renovations including cabinets, countertops, flooring, and appliances. Price range: $25,000-$150,000+.
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://buildwellct.com/bathroom-remodeling/): Complete bathroom renovations from design to installation. Price range: $15,000-$80,000+.
- [Basement Finishing](https://buildwellct.com/basement-finishing/): Transform unfinished basements into living spaces. Price range: $25,000-$100,000+.
- [Flooring](https://buildwellct.com/flooring/): Hardwood, tile, LVP, and carpet installation. Price range: $4-$25 per square foot installed.

### Additional Services
- [Remodeling Design and Planning](https://buildwellct.com/remodeling-design-planning/): Professional design services for home renovation projects
- [Comfort and Accessibility Remodeling](https://buildwellct.com/comfort-accessibility-remodeling/): Aging-in-place modifications and accessibility improvements
- [Home Additions](https://buildwellct.com/home-additions/): Room additions and home expansions
- [Interior Painting](https://buildwellct.com/interior-painting/): Professional interior painting services
- [Interior Carpentry](https://buildwellct.com/interior-carpentry/): Custom trim, molding, built-ins, and woodwork
- [Attic Conversions](https://buildwellct.com/attic-conversions/): Transform attic space into usable living areas
- [Decks and Porches](https://buildwellct.com/decks-porches/): Custom deck and porch construction

## Case Studies

- [Kitchen Remodeling in New Canaan](https://buildwellct.com/case-studies/kitchen-remodeling-new-canaan/): Full kitchen renovation with custom cabinets and flooring, 10-week timeline
- [Kitchen and Flooring in Milford](https://buildwellct.com/case-studies/kitchen-remodeling-milford/): Full kitchen remodel with LVP flooring, 6-week timeline
- [Bathroom Remodeling in Westport](https://buildwellct.com/case-studies/bathroom-remodeling-westport/): Primary bathroom transformation, 4-week timeline
- [Basement Finishing in Darien](https://buildwellct.com/case-studies/basement-finishing-darien/): 850 sq ft basement conversion with egress window, 6-week timeline
- [Whole-Home Restoration in Hamden](https://buildwellct.com/case-studies/whole-home-restoration-hamden/): Flooring, painting, bathroom, and drywall restoration, 5-week timeline
